objective: Open the microwave door by grasping the red handle and pulling along the door-opening arc.

frames.handle: Center of handle link (microwave link index 1)

trajectory_breakdown.name: read_scene_state
trajectory_breakdown.goal: Get current microwave and robot states.

trajectory_breakdown.name: height_align
trajectory_breakdown.goal: Move end-effector to handle height first.
trajectory_breakdown.motion_rule: Set target position to [ee_x_current, ee_y_current, handle_z] while keeping current orientation.

trajectory_breakdown.name: standoff_at_handle_height
trajectory_breakdown.goal: Move to a safe point in front of the handle at same z-level.
trajectory_breakdown.motion_rule: standoff_pos = handle_pos - pull_dir * standoff_distance; standoff_pos.z = handle_z

trajectory_breakdown.name: rotate_in_place_for_horizontal_grasp
trajectory_breakdown.goal: Rotate wrist and gripper to a horizontal side-grasp orientation.
trajectory_breakdown.constraint: Position stays at standoff_pos during rotation.

trajectory_breakdown.name: forward_approach
trajectory_breakdown.goal: Move forward at same height toward handle.
waypoints: pre_grasp_pos = handle_pos - pull_dir * pre_grasp_distance; pre_grasp_pos.z = handle_z
grasp_pos = handle_pos - pull_dir * grasp_distance; grasp_pos.z = handle_z

trajectory_breakdown.name: close_gripper_on_handle
trajectory_breakdown.stabilization: Hold pose briefly after closing for contact stabilization.
trajectory_breakdown.validation: Check finger-handle contact count > 0 if available.

trajectory_breakdown.name: pull_and_open_door
trajectory_breakdown.goal: Open door by pulling while tracking handle motion.
trajectory_breakdown.motion_rule: Advance door joint from current angle to target_door_joint_angle_rad and continuously track updated handle position with same grasp offset and orientation.

trajectory_breakdown.name: retreat
trajectory_breakdown.goal: Move up to a safe pose after opening.

success_criteria: Door joint angle reaches target_door_joint_angle_rad (or lower if fully open limit is lower).
No major collision with door panel during grasp approach.
Gripper remains approximately aligned with handle direction during pull.
